portfolio.activity: IBDP Grade 11 student at The Shri Ram Sc
portfolio.description: IBDP Grade 11 student at The Shri Ram School, Moulsari, with a strong interest for engineering, innovation, AI, and sustainability. Creator of EpiAlert, a seizure detection device (with a published patent application) recognized nationally. Award-winning innovator and international-level swimmer representing India. Passionate about leveraging technology for social impact and real-world problem solving. EDUCATION The Shri Ram School, Moulsari
IB Diploma Programme (Currently Pursuing), Grade 11
Higher Level (HL): Physics, Chemistry, Economics, Mathematics AA
Standard Level (SL): English, Spanish
Previously completed IGCSE (Grades 6–10)

SAT: 1570 (790 Maths, 780 English RW) – May 2026 EpiAlert EpiAlert is an innovative device developed by Saiansh, that can detect Epileptic seizures and raise alarms, enabling immediate care for the patient. No such device exists in India. (Patent applied for)

portfolio.activity: Device has been recognized nationally, with t
portfolio.description: Device has been recognized nationally, with the Dr. APJ Abdul Kalam Ignited Mind Award and the Best Prototype award at Plaksha University’s Young Creator’s League. portfolio.activity: Pollution Alert To reduce the widespread
portfolio.description: Pollution Alert To reduce the widespread air pollution in the city, Saiansh developed a mobile application that can be used to report instances of air pollution along with their location to government authorities. The government has acted on various reports of pollution via the app. The app has been recognised by Google and Times of India.
Technology: Python programming, ML development, avid tech quizzer
Sports: Swimmer with medals at the national level, represented the country at ISF World School Games
Science: Interested in Physics advancements and research, worked as part of winning team at the Asian Regional Space Settlement Design Competition (aerospace engineering simulation)
Maths: UKMT Senior Mathematics Competition Gold Award, Cathedral Maths Competition Gold Award
Scuba Diving: interested in aquatic exploration and wildlife photography
